description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python tests that runs on every push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use a matrix strategy job that runs on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8). For each combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies from requirements.txt and requirements-test.txt, test with pytest and coverage, and upload the coverage report to Codecov on ubuntu-latest.
